iti8:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti8:2.1:
“Monks, one who has not fully known & fully understood conceit, whose mind has not been cleansed of passion for it,
has not abandoned it, is incapable of putting an end to stress.
iti8:2.2:
But one who has fully known & fully understood conceit, whose mind has been cleansed of passion for it,
has abandoned it, is capable of putting an end to stress.”
iti8:3.2: bound with conceit delighted with becoming.
iti8:4.1: But those who, letting go of conceit,
